# Kritano

> Kritano is a website intelligence platform that audits sites across six pillars: SEO, accessibility, security, performance, content quality, and AI readiness (AEO). It provides actionable, prioritised reports with scores, findings, and fix recommendations.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://kritano.com/) - Main landing page
- [Services](https://kritano.com/services) - Overview of all auditing services
- [Pricing](https://kritano.com/pricing) - Plans from Free to Enterprise
- [FAQ](https://kritano.com/faq) - Frequently asked questions about the platform
- [About](https://kritano.com/about) - Mission, founder story, and six pillars explained
- [Contact](https://kritano.com/contact) - Get in touch
- [Blog](https://kritano.com/blog) - SEO, accessibility, security, and performance guides
- [API Docs](https://kritano.com/docs) - REST API documentation

## Service Detail Pages
- [SEO Auditing](https://kritano.com/services/seo) - 100+ ranking factor checks
- [Accessibility Testing](https://kritano.com/services/accessibility) - WCAG 2.2 Level AA compliance
- [Security Scanning](https://kritano.com/services/security) - OWASP-based vulnerability detection
- [Performance Analysis](https://kritano.com/services/performance) - Core Web Vitals and speed optimisation

## What Kritano Does
Kritano crawls websites and analyses every page against hundreds of rules, producing detailed reports with:
- **SEO**: Meta tags, structured data, broken links, canonical URLs, Core Web Vitals, mobile-friendliness, indexability, internal linking
- **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.2 Level AA via axe-core, colour contrast, keyboard navigation, ARIA, screen reader compatibility, EAA compliance mapping
- **Security**: HTTPS, security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options), mixed content, exposed files, cookie flags, SSL/TLS configuration
- **Performance**: Page load times, resource optimisation, render-blocking detection, caching analysis
- **Content Quality (CQS)**: Five sub-scores (quality, E-E-A-T, readability, engagement, structure) with 400+ checks across 7 analysis modules
- **AI Readiness (AEO)**: Answer Engine Optimisation measuring AI citability, extractable nuggets, factual density, source authority, structured data for AI systems

## Content Quality Score (CQS)
The CQS is a weighted composite score:
- Quality (25%): Content depth, multimedia, freshness, unique content ratio
- E-E-A-T (25%): Author signals, citations, credentials, trust indicators
- Readability (20%): Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, sentence variety
- Engagement (15%): CTAs, hooks, power words, transitions
- Structure (15%): Heading hierarchy, paragraph flow, lists, table of contents

## E-E-A-T Tiers
Pages are classified into three tiers based on expertise signals:
- Ghost Content: No author attribution, no trust signals
- Standard Web: Basic author info, some trust signals
- Expert Verified: Strong author credentials, citations, contact information

## AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation)
Measures how likely content is to be cited by AI systems:
- Nugget detection: Definitions, summaries, FAQ answers, data tables, concise answers
- Factual density scoring
- Source authority analysis
- Structured data for AI (FAQ, HowTo, ClaimReview schemas)
- Content frontloading analysis
- Tier classification: Ignored, General Reference, Primary Source

## Key Facts
- Founded by Chris Garlick, software engineer specialising in web auditing and SEO
- Based in the United Kingdom
- Serves businesses, agencies, and developers who want to improve website health
- Offers Free, Starter ($19/mo), Pro ($49/mo), Agency ($99/mo), and Enterprise plans
- Provides PDF, CSV, and JSON audit exports
- REST API available for programmatic access
- Supports scheduled recurring audits
- Domain verification via DNS TXT or file-based methods
- GDPR compliant with data export and deletion support

## Blog Categories
- SEO, Accessibility, Security, Performance, Content Quality, Structured Data, E-E-A-T, AEO, Guides, Case Studies, Product Updates

- Blog posts with full articles: https://kritano.com/blog
- Blog sitemap: https://kritano.com/api/blog/sitemap.xml
